owners: Backend AdvancedFeature and /api/features remain capability authority.
Generated backendEndpointManifest owns frontend/backend endpoint existence checks.
metadataGovernanceService owns metadata governance frontend requests.
Spring starter SRE contributors own runtime adapter health/status presentation inputs.
invariants: Disabled backend features prevent protected frontend calls.
Frontend does not return or display raw provider API keys.
SRE adapter contributors report configured adapter type and Spring bean presence, not live network probe results.
compatBoundary: Backend legacy paths and /api/** aliases are retained; frontend behavior degrades based on backend capability state instead of assuming unavailable endpoints exist.
nonGoals: No real secrets in docs/tests/frontend responses.
No exhaustive P2 backend capability adoption.
